name: Change Game State
desc: Changes a global game state: rain toggle, gamemode change, credits, demo messages, elder guardian effect.

fields.name: value
fields.desc: Value associated with reason (gamemode ID, rain strength, fade value)

notes: Reason 0: bed can't be set (respawn). Reason 1/2: rain toggle. Reason 3: gamemode change (value=0-3). Reason 4: credits. Reason 5: demo. Reason 6: arrow hitting entity. Reason 7/8: fade values. Reason 9: elder guardian effect.

implementation.overview: S2BPacketChangeGameState controls global state via reason+value pairs. NoRain modules cancel reasons 1/2 (rain start/stop) to keep weather clear. Gamemode detection uses reason 3 to track creative/survival switches. Disabler modules read reason 10 (end combat) indirectly through this packet.

modules.name: NoRain / NoWeather (Gugustus / Tenacity 6.0)
modules.purpose: Cancel S2BPacketChangeGameState when reason=1 (start rain) or reason=2 (stop rain) to keep weather permanently clear. The server sends rain updates but the client ignores them.
modules.how_it_works: On EventReceivePacket, check instanceof S2BPacketChangeGameState. If getGameState() is 1 or 2, cancel the packet. The client's rain strength stays at 0.
modules.vanilla_hook: NetHandlerPlayClient.handleChangeGameState(S2BPacketChangeGameState) — toggles rain, changes gamemode, plays credits.

implementation.general_hooks:
Client: NetHandlerPlayClient.handleChangeGameState(S2BPacketChangeGameState). NoRain cancels reasons 1/2.

Server: WorldProvider/EntityPlayerMP sends weather changes. ServerConfigurationManager sends gamemode changes.
